goal: Organize frontend work around a Next.js chat-first Wallet Copilot UI. The frontend uses Phantom injected for auth/display and signing prepared backend transactions and delegates all transaction execution, blockchain/provider access, risk policy, quotes and receipts to the backend/agent.
notes: This file supersedes the older provider-based risk-engine task breakdown.
Do not implement Jupiter, Helius, Birdeye, risk-score providers, Solana RPC, transaction simulation or transaction signing in front/src.
All frontend network calls target project-owned /api/* endpoints defined in frontend-spec.md.

tasks.title: Layout shell + mock data
scope: TopBar, BottomNav, sidebar, chat container and assets/status panels
acceptanceCriteria: UI matches the mockup direction without blockchain logic
evidence: Implemented during design + SSoT migration; see docs/task-execution-report.md.

tasks.title: Phantom injected auth + backend balances
acceptanceCriteria: Wallet SDK is used only for login/display/export/disconnect
Frontend does not export signing helpers
evidence: Implemented during design + SSoT migration; see docs/task-execution-report.md.

tasks.title: Chat with mocked backend protocol
scope: Render text, function_call, alert and text+execute
acceptanceCriteria: Only one pending proposal per session
ChatInput blocks until Confirm/Cancel when pendingProposal exists
evidence: Implemented during design + SSoT migration; see docs/task-execution-report.md.

tasks.title: Swap end-to-end via agent
scope: Agent decides auto-execute vs manual confirmation
Confirm sends function_approve; Cancel sends function_reject
text+execute closes proposal and refetches wallet data
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend never builds, simulates, signs or submits transactions
evidence: Implemented during design + SSoT migration; see docs/task-execution-report.md.

tasks.title: Polish safety UI and settings
scope: RiskAlert/AlertBanner rendering from backend risk payload
Settings sheet with auto-confirm threshold and account actions
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend displays risk but does not compute risk
evidence: Implemented during design + SSoT migration; see docs/task-execution-report.md.

tasks.title: API contracts + Zod validation
acceptanceCriteria: No schema models direct third-party provider responses
evidence: Implemented during design + SSoT migration; see docs/task-execution-report.md.

tasks.title: App wiring
scope: Tabs Chat/Assets/Explore/History wired to scoped behavior
acceptanceCriteria: No front/src/pages entrypoint is treated as canonical
evidence: Implemented during design + SSoT migration; see docs/task-execution-report.md.

tasks.title: Documentation validation
evidence: Implemented during design + SSoT migration; see docs/task-execution-report.md.

tasks.title: API boundary and fallback UI
scope: UI labels mock/demo/unavailable/stale when backend returns those flags
acceptanceCriteria: No frontend provider keys or direct provider fetches
evidence: Implemented during design + SSoT migration; see docs/task-execution-report.md.

tasks.title: Functional validation checklist
scope: Manual checklist for login, wallet data, chat, proposal states and API boundaries
acceptanceCriteria: No commands are required for this documentation-only reorganization
evidence: Implemented during design + SSoT migration; see docs/task-execution-report.md.
